name: mouse_centromere_block
description: Mouse pericentromeric and centromeric blocks. All mouse chromosomes are telocentric (centromere at one end) except a few Robertsonian-fusion derivatives in wild-derived strains. Each centromeric block is built from minor-satellite tandem arrays at the kinetochore core flanked by major-satellite arrays in pericentromeric heterochromatin. Blocks are 1-5 Mb of compound tandem repeat. In GRCm39 most centromeres remain partially assembled — gaps are smaller than in mm10 but not closed end-to-end.
